ShivAI Token is a private, compliance-first digital asset platform. Secure. Permissioned. Built for long-term institutional value.

Token Value $2.45 USD
SA
ShivAI Platform @shivai_official
What is ShivAI Token?

Digital asset infrastructure
built for institutions

ShivAI Token is not a cryptocurrency you trade on an exchange. It is a permissioned digital instrument representing structured economic participation — designed with regulatory compliance at its foundation.

📊

Economic Exposure

Represents proportional economic exposure to the ShivAI platform ecosystem. Value accrues through platform growth, not market speculation.

🔒

Not Publicly Tradable

Tokens are transfer-restricted by smart contract. There is no public market, no DEX listing, no OTC circulation outside the platform.

✅

Permissioned & KYC-Only

Every participant is individually verified. Access requires identity verification and regulatory compliance confirmation before any token issuance.

⬡

Built on Polygon

Deployed on Polygon for institutional-grade reliability, low settlement costs, and full on-chain auditability with Ethereum security guarantees.

Process

Four steps to secure participation

A structured, compliance-gated onboarding designed to protect both investors and the integrity of the platform.

01

Request Access

Submit your investor inquiry. Our team reviews your profile against platform eligibility criteria within 48 hours.

02

Complete KYC

Full identity verification and accredited investor screening through our regulated compliance partner.

03

Invest Securely

Submit investment intent through the investor panel. Funds processed via verified payment rails with full documentation.

04

Receive Tokens

Tokens are issued to your custodial wallet within the platform. All transfers recorded on-chain with immutable audit logs.

Token Structure

Transparent allocation,
no speculation

Fixed supply, structured lock-in, and clear separation between investment and incentive tokens.

Total Supply100,000,000 SHVAI
Investment Tokens70,000,000 (70%)
Incentive / Drop Tokens30,000,000 (30%)
Lock-in Period24 Months
Public TradingNone — Restricted
NetworkPolygon (MATIC)
Investment Tokens70%
Incentive / Drop Tokens30%
Important Notice

ShivAI Token does not represent equity, debt, or a security in any jurisdiction unless separately classified by applicable law.

⚠ No Public Trading

Token transfers are restricted by smart contract. Tokens cannot be sold, transferred, or traded outside the platform without express administrative authorization.

🔐 Custodial Wallets Only

All tokens are held in platform-custodied wallets. Investors do not self-custody private keys, ensuring compliance with transfer restrictions at all times.

Security & Compliance

Regulation-first architecture

Every layer of the platform is designed with compliance, auditability, and investor protection as first-order requirements.

✅

KYC Verified

All participants are identity-verified by a regulated compliance provider before any token issuance.

🏦

Wallet-Custodied

Platform manages custodial wallets. No self-custody reduces risk of unauthorized transfers.

🔒

Transfer Restricted

Smart contract enforces transfer restrictions. Tokens cannot leave the permissioned ecosystem.

📋

Audit Logs

Every issuance, transfer attempt, and administrative action is logged on-chain and off-chain.

❄️

Emergency Freeze

Authorized administrators can freeze wallets and halt transfers in response to compliance events.

🌐

Jurisdiction Gated

Platform access is restricted by geography. Prohibited jurisdictions are blocked at onboarding.

Investor Access

Private platform.
Invite-only access.

This is not a public offering. Access to the ShivAI Token platform is strictly controlled. If you have received an invitation from our team, enter your invite code to proceed.

→ Accredited investors only
→ Minimum investment requirements apply
→ Full KYC / AML verification required
→ Regulated jurisdictions only
Investor Login
Enter your credentials or invite code to access the platform.
or
🔒 This is a private platform. Access is invite-only.
ShivAI Token
SupportLegalPrivacy Policy
Legal Disclaimer: ShivAI Token is not a publicly offered investment product and does not constitute a security, investment advice, or a solicitation to invest in any jurisdiction where such activities are restricted. This platform and its tokens are available exclusively to pre-qualified, invited participants who meet applicable eligibility criteria. Token issuance is subject to full KYC/AML verification. All transactions are subject to a mandatory 24-month lock-in period. No public market exists for ShivAI Token and none is expected to develop. Not available to residents of sanctioned or prohibited jurisdictions. Contact: compliance@shivai.io
